primary_reasons: Mechanism is somewhat novel but resembles existing adaptive methods.
Implementation lacks clarity on how it differs from low-rank or quantization techniques.
Expected metric change is uncertain and may not be competitive.
revision_instructions: To enhance novelty, consider incorporating a unique mechanism for parameter generation that is distinct from existing methods. Explore alternative architectures or techniques that do not rely on layer embeddings or synthesizers. Additionally, clarify how this approach fundamentally differs from low-rank approximations or quantization methods in terms of performance and implementation.
